name: Creole Bell Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Eggplant, small, diced
2. Butter or margarine, tablespoon
3. Flour, tablespoon
4. Onion, chopped, half cup
5. Cooked rice, two cups
6. Crabmeat, picked over (6 ounces)
7. Parsley, chopped, three tablespoons
8. Chicken broth, three-quarters cup
9. Cayenne pepper, eighth teaspoon
10. Green bell peppers, five large
11. Rice cereal crumbs, crushed quarter cup
12. Butter
1. Cover eggplant with salted water; let stand for 20 minutes.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet; add flour and cook until browned, stirring.
3. Drain eggplant; add to the skillet along with onion and sauté until tender.
4. Stir in rice, crabmeat, parsley, chicken broth, and seasonings; blend well.
5. Cut tops off bell peppers and scoop out seeds.
6. Parboil peppers for about 5 minutes; drain and fill with rice mixture.
7. Sprinkle tops with cereal crumbs and stand upright in a buttered baking dish.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 20 minutes.
